## Topic

What concept or technology to explore.

## Learning Objectives

- [ ] Understand X
- [ ] Be able to explain Y
- [ ] Demonstrate Z with working code

## Resources

Links to documentation, tutorials, or references.

## Output

What artifact will this produce? (guide, code example, test, etc.)
